testsuite.name: Storage Layer Integration

testcase.name: should track operations and cleanup correctly
should fail recovery when too many shards are lost
should perform full async ingest and retrieve cycle with progress
should recover from partial shard loss using erasure coding

testsuite.system-out: On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: 4b3d459b85ddaae602f7fb39b60347e60806e1ebaafdbd1495e5957d48a6903b On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: bc4c358d9c01d0470c304d08844deef6d37c1ccf8aba20cc4c5b0a89d30cda63
